testcase.name: unittests.test_schema
testcase.error: unittests/test_schema.py:9: in <module> import stackinator.schema as schema stackinator/schema.py:11: in <module> config_validator = cerberus.Validator(config_schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/validator.py:183: in __init__ self.schema = kwargs.get('schema', None) ^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/validator.py:594: in schema self._schema = DefinitionSchema(self, schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:81: in __init__ schema = self.expand(schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:131: in expand schema = cls._rename_deprecated_rulenames(schema) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/cerberus/schema.py:229: in _rename_deprecated_rulenames if old not in rules: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable
